# Copilot Instructions

This repository is a sermon website project.

## Goals

- Build a clean, fast, static website
- Use markdown as the primary content source
- Keep code simple and maintainable
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies

## Coding Style

- Prefer semantic HTML
- Keep components reusable
- Keep file structure predictable
- Use clear naming conventions

## Content Model

- Sermons are markdown files
- Each sermon includes frontmatter:
  - title
  - date
  - passage
  - tags
  - summary

## Do NOT

- Over-engineer solutions
- Add frameworks without explanation
- Introduce complex state management

## Always

- Explain major file changes before generating code
- Prefer simple solutions first
